name: Newsmax Inc.
summary: Corporate History Newsmax Inc. (the Company) is a holding company that owns 100% of the equity interests of its operating company Newsmax Media, Inc. (Newsmax Media). Newsmax Media and its other subsidiaries operate the businesses described herein. Newsmax Media has six wholly-owned Florida limited liability company subsidiaries (the Subsidiaries): Newsmax Broadcasting, LLC (Newsmax Broadcasting), Newsmax Radio LLC (Newsmax Radio), Crown Atlantic Insurance, LLC (Crown Atlantic), Humanix Publishi...
